title: Ultimate Fishing Simulator

notes: While the game appears to have no issues actually starting, there is quite a bit that needs done with its compatibility. The radio stations, while functional crackle consistently every 10 or so seconds. There are no 3D fish models at all it seems, even upon landing a fish all you will see is empty space where the fish should be. These honestly could be ignored, if the game itself didn't crash so hard upon exit that it hangs the entire system to the point of needing a reboot.
title: Ultimate Fishing Simulator
